title: task
description: python/src/lichen/interface/meshtastic/translate.py:130-137 - Position.from_bytes handles wire types 0, 2, and 5 but breaks on unknown wire types including 1 (fixed64). If a Position protobuf contains a fixed64 field (even one we ignore), parsing stops early and later fields are missed. Failure scenario: Meshtastic sends Position with precision_bits or extension using fixed64, latitude/longitude not parsed.
close_reason: Fixed: Added wire type 1 (fixed64) handling to Position.from_bytes - skips 8 bytes instead of breaking, allowing fields after fixed64 to be parsed correctly
